---
title: "Experiences"
---
 
::: {.card-grid-stacked}

::: {.card}
### Geospatial Analyst (Volunteer)
#### Tayo Climate Partners • 2025 - Present • Remote
**Voluntary geospatial role supporting blue carbon and coastal restoration projects. 
Work covers data pre-processing, spatial analysis workflows, 
and site suitability assessments to evaluate the potential of sites for mangrove and other ecosystem restoration initiatives.**

**Tools: GIS, ArcGIS, Python, R**
:::

::: {.card}
### Environmental Officer
#### Lilongwe City Council • July 2024 - May 2025 • Lilongwe, Malawi
**Hands-on environmental planning role focused on urban development compliance and impact assessment. 
Work covered spatial data analysis, environmental auditing, stakeholder engagement, 
and regulatory monitoring across infrastructure and waste projects.**

**Tools: GIS, ArcGIS, ESMPs, Environmental Auditing, Stakeholder Consultation**
:::

::: {.card}
### Environmental Consultant
#### Water, Waste and Environmental Consultants • August 2022 - June 2024 • Lilongwe, Malawi
**Consulting role focused on environmental and social impact assessment across energy and infrastructure projects. 
Work covered field data collection, geospatial analysis, and statistical modelling to inform compliance decisions and mitigation strategies.**

**Tools: GIS, ArcGIS, SPSS, STATA**
:::

:::
